'''hanama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hickie|hickie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hickie|hickie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hanama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænæmæth|hænæmæth]] || [[word:hænæmæj|hænæmæj]] || [[word:hænæmæsh|hænæmæsh]] || [[word:hænæmæ|hænæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hananamath|hananamath]] || [[word:hananamaj|hananamaj]] || [[word:hananamash|hananamash]] || [[word:hananama|hananama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanamath|hanamath]] || [[word:hanamaj|hanamaj]] || [[word:hanamash|hanamash]] || [[word:hanama|hanama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanafmath|hanafmath]] || [[word:hanafmaj|hanafmaj]] || [[word:hanafmash|hanafmash]] || [[word:hanafmaf|hanafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanamatha|hanamatha]] || [[word:hanamaja|hanamaja]] || [[word:hanamasha|hanamasha]] || [[word:hanamaka|hanamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanamath|hanamath]] || [[word:hanamaj|hanamaj]] || [[word:hanamash|hanamash]] || [[word:hanama|hanama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanamathal|hanamathal]] || [[word:hanamajal|hanamajal]] || [[word:hanamashal|hanamashal]] || [[word:hanamakal|hanamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanamathatha|hanamathatha]] || [[word:hanamajaja|hanamajaja]] || [[word:hanamashasha|hanamashasha]] || [[word:hanamaka|hanamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanamathan|hanamathan]] || [[word:hanamajan|hanamajan]] || [[word:hanamashan|hanamashan]] || [[word:hanamakan|hanamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanamathaoro|hanamathaoro]] || [[word:hanamajaoro|hanamajaoro]] || [[word:hanamashaoro|hanamashaoro]] || [[word:hanamakaoro|hanamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
